# COBE — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An interactive educational platform featuring a dual-interface system where teachers upload video content with accompanying questions, students watch and respond via audio recordings, and teachers provide personalized grades and feedback in a seamless learning loop. The platform emphasizes multimedia engagement and streamlined communication between educators and learners.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://cobe.zappy5.app
COBE brings teachers and pupils together through interactive video lessons, audio responses, and personalized feedback. Start your free online learning platform journey today.

### For Teachers
https://cobe.zappy5.app/teachers
Empower your teaching with COBE&#39;s free online platform. Upload video content, add questions, review student audio responses, and provide grades effortlessly.

### For Students
https://cobe.zappy5.app/students
Experience engaging education on COBE&#39;s free online learning platform. Watch teacher videos, record audio answers, and receive personalized feedback instantly.

### Contact
https://cobe.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to transform your classroom experience? Contact COBE to learn how our free online teaching platform connects educators and learners through multimedia engagement.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://cobe.zappy5.app/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://cobe.zappy5.app/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

https://cobe.zappy5.app/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About COBE
An interactive educational platform featuring a dual-interface system where teachers upload video content with accompanying questions, students watch and respond via audio recordings, and teachers provide personalized grades and feedback in a seamless learning loop. The platform emphasizes multimedia engagement and streamlined communication between educators and learners.

## Target Audience
teachers and pupils

## Industry
education technology

---
